title: Ace Roots Honors Ijebu Heritage at Ojude Oba Festival - FinancialEDGE

html:
Ace Roots, a unique low-sugar drink that celebrates African heritage, proudly participated in the iconic Ojude Oba Festival in Ijebu Ode.

The festival, held annually two days after Eid-el-Kabir, is a vibrant celebration of Ijebu culture and traditions.

Ace Roots joined the Ijebu community and visitors from around the world in the grand celebration, which featured colorful parades, traditional music, dancing, and cultural displays.

The brand’s presence was marked by engaging activities and interactive sessions, showcasing its commitment to honoring African heritage.

By participating in the Ojude Oba Festival, Ace Roots demonstrated its dedication to celebrating the rich cultural traditions of the Ijebu people and promoting the beauty of African heritage.

The brand’s unique blend of African herbs, spices, and fruits resonated with the festival’s spirit of cultural celebration and community unity.
